encounter.reason: Follow-up during measles isolation (day 3 post-rash onset)
encounter.service_provider: UW Health University Student Health Services
encounter.location: Telemedicine (patient in university isolation housing, Madison, WI; clinician at UW Health University Student Health Services, Madison, WI)

medications.name: acetaminophen 500 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: 500 mg by mouth every 6 hours as needed for fever and discomfort

medications.name: vitamin A 200,000 international units oral
medications.sig: 200,000 international units by mouth, two doses

document_references.description: Scheduled telemedicine video visit note documenting day 6 of confirmed measles illness during university isolation. Records subjective improvement (decreasing fever, rash progression, improving cough, tolerating oral intake), limited video-based objective assessment, assessment of improving course with no complications identified, and plan to continue isolation through March 27, continue acetaminophen PRN, encourage hydration, and return for in-person clearance visit on March 30, 2026.
